commands.note: The packaged smoke runner returned blocker findings even though the bootstrap log contains server_bootstrap_ready and browser_window_loaded, the screenshot file exists, and no DBSchemaExcel2DDL process remained after the run. Treat this as a packaged smoke runner false-negative until the runner logic is corrected.

commands.command: powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\script\desktop-packaged-smoke-installer.ps1 -SemiManual -ManualEvidence "Semi-manual on 2026-03-19: installer UI and first-launch steps require operator confirmation on this machine."
commands.note: Installer coverage remains explicit and reviewable, but semi-manual on this machine.

blockers.message: win-unpacked evidence was captured, but the current smoke runner classified the run as failed despite observed readiness checkpoints, screenshot capture, and process exit.

manualOnlyCoverage.details: Installer UI and first-launch confirmation still require operator review on this machine. The semi-manual status is recorded in the NSIS artifact.
